steps.title: Follow finding to future use
steps.content: The passage first reports research findings: Matabele ants identify infected wounds, treat them with antimicrobial secretions, and reduce mortality. It then notes hope that the finding may help develop new antibiotics. That final human-antibiotic note is prospective, not a method.

steps.title: Rule out unused structures
steps.content: A frames the issue as a proposed solution, C adds evolution, and D claims methods are explained. The text reports findings and then points to a future research application; no procedure details are supplied in the passage. The answer is B.
